questions.question: What is a Jupyter notebook?
options: A text editor for writing Python scripts
An interactive document that mixes executable code cells with markdown text and inline outputs
A version control system for data science projects
A package manager for Python libraries
optionsZh: 用于编写 Python 脚本的文本编辑器（Text Editor）
一种将可执行代码单元格（Executable Code Cells）与 Markdown 文本及内联输出（Inline Outputs）相结合的交互式文档（Interactive Document）
面向数据科学（Data Science）项目的版本控制系统（Version Control System）
Python 库的包管理器 (Package Manager)
questions.explanation: A Jupyter notebook (.ipynb) is an interactive environment where you can write and execute code in cells, see outputs inline, and mix code with formatted text explanations.
questions.explanationZh: Jupyter 笔记本（Jupyter Notebook）（.ipynb）是一种交互式环境，您可以在其中以单元格（cell）为单位编写和执行代码、直接查看内联（inline）输出，并将代码与格式化的文本说明相结合。

questions.question: What does the Jupyter kernel do?
questions.questionZh: Jupyter 内核（Jupyter kernel）的作用是什么？
options: Formats markdown cells into HTML
Runs the code in cells and keeps variables in memory between executions
Manages file storage for the notebook
Connects the notebook to GitHub for version control
optionsZh: 将 Markdown 单元格 (Markdown cells) 转换为 HTML。
运行单元格中的代码，并在多次执行之间将变量保留在内存中。
管理笔记本（Notebook）的文件存储
将笔记本（Notebook）连接到 GitHub 以进行版本控制（Version Control）。
questions.explanation: The kernel is a separate Python process that executes cell code and maintains state (variables, imports) in memory. All cells in a notebook share the same kernel.
questions.explanationZh: 内核 (Kernel) 是一个独立的 Python 进程，负责执行单元格 (Cell) 代码并在内存中维护状态（变量、导入）。笔记本 (Notebook) 中的所有单元格共享同一个内核。

questions.question: What is the difference between %timeit and %%time magic commands?
questions.questionZh: %timeit 和 %%time 魔法命令（magic commands）之间有什么区别？
options: %timeit measures wall time, %%time measures CPU time
%timeit runs code many times and averages, %%time runs code once
%timeit works on single lines, %%time works on the whole notebook
There is no difference, they are aliases
optionsZh: %timeit 测量的是墙上时间（Wall Time），%%time 测量的是 CPU 时间（CPU Time）。
`%timeit` 会多次运行代码并计算平均值，而 `%%time` 仅运行代码一次。
`%timeit` 适用于单行代码，`%%time` 适用于整个 Notebook。
两者没有区别，它们是别名 (aliases)。
questions.explanation: %timeit runs the statement many times for a statistical average (good for microbenchmarks). %%time runs the cell once and reports wall time (good for training runs).
questions.explanationZh: `%timeit` 会多次执行该语句以计算统计平均值（statistical average），适用于微基准测试（microbenchmark）。`%%time` 仅运行该单元格一次并报告墙上时间（wall time），适用于训练运行（training run）。

questions.question: What is the most common cause of a notebook working on your machine but failing when someone runs it top to bottom?
questions.questionZh: 导致交互式笔记本（Notebook）在你本地运行正常，但其他人从头到尾顺序执行时却失败的最常见原因是什么？
options: Using a different Python version
Out-of-order cell execution creating hidden dependencies on execution order
Missing the %matplotlib inline magic command
Using too many markdown cells
optionsZh: 使用不同版本的 Python
乱序执行单元格（Out-of-order cell execution）会引发对执行顺序的隐藏依赖
缺少 %matplotlib inline 魔法命令 (magic command)
使用过多的 Markdown 单元格 (Markdown cells)
questions.explanation: Running cells out of order creates hidden state dependencies. A variable might exist because you ran cell 5 before cell 2. Kernel > Restart & Run All verifies linear execution.
questions.explanationZh: 乱序运行单元格 (Cell) 会引发隐藏的状态依赖 (Hidden State Dependencies)。某个变量之所以存在，可能是因为你先运行了单元格 5，后运行了单元格 2。使用 Kernel > Restart & Run All 可验证代码是否支持线性执行 (Linear Execution)。

questions.question: When should you move code from a notebook into a .py script?
questions.questionZh: 何时应将代码从交互式笔记本（Notebook）迁移至 .py 脚本中？
options: As soon as you write more than 10 lines of code
When the code is a reusable utility, training pipeline, or production code
Never -- notebooks are always better for AI work
Only when you need to run on a GPU
optionsZh: 一旦你编写的代码超过10行
当代码为可复用工具（reusable utility）、训练流水线（training pipeline）或生产代码（production code）时
绝不——交互式笔记本（Notebook）始终是 AI 工作的更佳选择。
仅在需要在图形处理器 (GPU) 上运行时
questions.explanation: The rule is 'explore in notebooks, ship in scripts.' Reusable utilities, training pipelines, and anything running in production should be .py files. Notebooks are for exploration and prototyping.
questions.explanationZh: 核心原则是“在交互式笔记本（Notebook）中进行探索，在脚本（Script）中进行交付”。可复用的工具模块、训练流水线（Training Pipeline）以及任何在生产环境（Production）中运行的代码，均应保存为 `.py` 文件。Notebook 仅用于探索性分析与原型开发（Prototyping）。
